case_title: MOHAMED ACHRAF KOUNI VS. CYBELLE'S PIZZA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOUNI, MOHAMED ACHRAF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYBELLE'S PIZZA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHEHADEH, IHAB TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA SHEHADEH, AYMAN TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA $62,286.75 PRINCIPAL, $1,708.58 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $64,445.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUNI, MOHAMED ACHRAF AS TO DEFENDANT CYBELLE'S PIZZA, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SHEHADEH, IHAB TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA SHEHADEH, AYMAN TALEB EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF CYBELLE'S PIZZA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
